description: ScholarOne Manuscripts (formerly Manuscript Central) by Clarivate. The most widely used manuscript submission system, used by Nature Portfolio, Wiley, Oxford University Press, IEEE, Taylor & Francis, and SAGE.
step_by_step: 1. Create account at manuscriptcentral.com for your target journal
2. Click 'Author Center' then 'Submit a New Manuscript'
3. Select manuscript type (Article, Review, Letter, etc.)
5. Upload main document (anonymised — no author info)
6. Upload Title Page as SEPARATE file
7. Upload each figure as a separate file (FigN.tif naming)
9. Enter suggested and opposed reviewers in 'Peer Review Preferences'
10. Paste cover letter in the text box (do not upload as file)
11. Review PDF proof generated by system
12. Click 'Submit' — system will confirm receipt by email
common_errors: Author names in manuscript body → system flags anonymity violation
Title page not separate → editors see author info during review
Figure naming with spaces or version numbers → causes processing errors
Cover letter uploaded as PDF → system may not display it to editors
ORCID not linked → author cannot receive credit for review

file_requirements.title_page: Separate Word or PDF with all author info
file_requirements.figures: TIFF (300+ dpi), EPS, or PDF; named Fig1.tif, Fig2.tif ...
